originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

sanitizedDescription: Assigned value is garbage or undefined
reasoning: At L18, *((__u64 *)buf + i*8) performs pointer arithmetic beyond the 16-byte buf array. After the first iteration i=8, *((__u64*)buf + 64) reads 512 bytes past buf (64 * sizeof(__u64)=8), yielding undefined garbage. // ERROR at L18 confirms this is a VBDB-known bug. PC = CONFIG_S390_PRNG is a single real feature flag that correctly constrains to when prng_seed is compiled. No library macros.
